prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6.4L HEMI crate engine (Mopar Performance Part #P5155983) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, and a Callies crankshaft) paired with a Whipple 3.0L supercharger (Part #130-100-30) pushing 10 psi, mated to a ZF 8HP95 transmission with a Level 10 torque converter and a custom TCM tune by DiabloSport (InTune i3 Platinum) for 650+ WHP and 600+ lb-ft of torque

Full custom exhaust system featuring 3.5" stainless steel mandrel-bent piping (Stainless Works) with Borla Pro XS mufflers (Part #40869) and a custom X-pipe setup, paired with long-tube headers (Stainless Works Part #SW22100) and a MagnaFlow catalytic converter (Part #54572) for optimized scavenging and sound tuning

Suspension overhaul with a custom Bilstein B16 coilover kit (Part #B16 PSS9) revalved specifically for the Wagoneer's unibody chassis, paired with Eibach Pro-Street S springs (Part #2.7125.140.0275) and Hellwig sway bars (Front: Part #7995, Rear: Part #7996) to reduce body roll, complemented by a Hotchkis Sport suspension kit (Part #22100) for improved camber and caster alignment
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny Wagoneer-specific kit (Part #RB-WAG3) with carbon fiber fenders, extended rocker panels, and a custom front splitter, paired with a custom rear diffuser (Seibon Carbon) and a 3M Matte Military Green wrap (Part #1080-M227) for a stealth military aesthetic

OEM+ lighting upgrade featuring LUX H11 LED headlights (Part #LX-LH11) with a Morimoto XB35 LED fog light kit (Part #45140) and a custom sequential LED taillight setup (Diode Dynamics Part #SEQ7) integrated with the Wagoneer's OEM wiring harness via a Plug-and-Play adapter (Part #DD-SEQ-HARNESS)

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara headliner (EuroCompulsion), custom Recaro SRD front seats (Part #SRD-900) with Schroth 6-point harnesses (Part #ASM4203R), and a custom roll cage (Autopower Industries Part #WAG3-RC) painted in satin black, paired with a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (Part #008-200-121-26) and a custom gauge cluster (Dakota Digital RTX Series, Part #RTX-WAG3)
